title: Careers at Glassbox
description: Explore career opportunities to grow with Glassbox in media business development and advertising solutions.
emptyDescription: There are no published vacancies at the moment. Please check again soon.

vacancies.title: Sales & Business Development
vacancies.experience: Minimum 2 years in B2B Sales / Business Development
vacancies.summary: Develop new business opportunities, build client relationships, and drive sales targets for Glassbox media placement services.
responsibilities: Actively source and manage a pipeline of new client prospects.
Prepare commercial proposals and service presentations based on client needs.
Build long-term relationships with clients and strategic partners.
Coordinate with operations team to ensure campaign delivery quality.
Achieve monthly/quarterly sales targets and maintain activity reports.
requirements: Minimum D3/S1 degree from any major.
Experience in B2B sales, media, advertising, or agency is a strong plus.
Strong communication, presentation confidence, and negotiation skills.
Familiar with end-to-end sales process from prospecting to closing.
Able to work independently and collaboratively within a team.
benefits: Networking opportunities with major brands and partners.

application.method: Send your CV and short profile by email.
application.subject: Application Sales & Business Development - [Full Name]
steps: Submit your application email using the requested subject format.
HR/Recruitment team will run initial screening.
Shortlisted candidates will be invited for interview and case discussion.

jobPostingAddress.streetAddress: Gedung perkantoran (isi alamat kantor resmi Glassbox)
